Get it fixed fast by a Brisbane garage door specialist. Our network of qualified, local technicians sorts broken springs, faulty openers, jammed roller doors and off-track sectional doors right across the metro catchment. Network of qualified technicians Fast, prompt response Indicative pricing upfront Written fixed-price quote Servicing Tarragindi, Camp Hill, Coorparoo, Carindale, Mount Gravatt and Brisbane Southside suburbs across the inner south, eastern southside and Mount Gravatt corridor. Request a free quote Send the form and a Brisbane garage door specialist from our network will call you back, usually fast. Your name Phone Email Suburb / Postcode Get My Free Quote Your details are handled through the enquiry team. See our privacy policy . Southside local coverage The network is focused on Brisbane Southside suburbs where opener, spring, roller and off-track call-outs happen every week. Qualified technicians Enquiries are matched with independent garage door technicians who handle residential repairs, servicing and replacement work. Written fixed-price quotes Indicative pricing is shown for planning, but the matched technician provides the actual written quote before work begins. Licensed opener electrical work Where a powered opener needs mains electrical work, that part is carried out by a licensed electrician under Queensland law. Garage door repairs across Brisbane: springs, openers and roller door repairs From a snapped torsion spring or a worn lifting cable to a powered opener that has stopped responding, the technicians in our network handle the full range of residential garage door work. That covers sectional, roller and tilt doors, off-track and derailed doors, panel and section replacement, remote and keypad programming, and prompt emergency call-outs for a door that will not secure. Where a job involves electrical work on a powered opener, it is carried out by a licensed electrician under the Queensland Electrical Safety Act 2002. Tell us what is happening with your door and our team will arrange a qualified Brisbane technician who provides a written fixed-price quote first. Garage Door Spring Repair Garage Door Opener Repair Off-Track Door Repair Panel and Section Replacement Roller Door Repair Cable and Roller Replacement Remote and Keypad Programming New Garage Door Installation Emergency Garage Door Repair See all garage door services Indicative Brisbane pricing Typical 2026 ranges for common repairs. Repair Indicative range Service call-out / standard service $120 - $200 Torsion spring replacement $220 - $450 Lifting cable replacement $180 - $320 Track roller replacement $160 - $300 Opener / motor replacement $600 - $1,100 New sectional door (single, supplied and installed) $2,500 - $5,000 These figures are indicative only and are not a quote. They do not bind any technician or supplier in our network. Real prices vary by door type and size, spring and hardware condition, opener brand, site access and after-hours surcharges. Always obtain a written fixed-price quote from a qualified garage door technician before committing to any repair. Quick to come out, sorted the door and very fair on price. Thank you. L., Wishart Common garage door repair questions How much do garage door repairs cost in Brisbane? + Garage door repairs in Brisbane typically range from a little over $100 for minor adjustments through to several hundred dollars when parts such as springs or motors need replacing. As an indicative guide, a service call-out is around $120 to $200, a torsion spring replacement around $220 to $450, and an opener or motor replacement around $600 to $1,100. The final cost depends on the door type, the extent of the fault and whether new components are required. The matched technician provides a written fixed-price quote before any work begins. Can you fix a garage door the same day? + Many standard repairs, such as a broken spring, a faulty opener or a door that is off its track, are completed in one to two hours once the technician is on site.
